title: Wine and Distilled Alcoholic Beverage Merchant Wholesalers

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 424820 ($10,191,470,266) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 424820 ($120,796,098,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).
